FrankX.AI
FRIEND PROFILE - PUBLIC-SAFE DRAFT
Ana Cecilia Cancino

This is the human page. Ana's own site stays the center of her voice. FrankX adds the practical bridge: a way to turn HR, psychology, faith, embodiment, and self-knowledge work into a travel-friendly AI-assisted business.

Para Ana: sencillo, util, humano. No hype. No fake quotes. Just a clear path from what she already does to offers she can repeat, improve, and carry with her.

See her business system
Download starter kit
Ana's site
Ana

EXISTING CENTER

Soul, people, clarity, and work that can travel.

Her site already has a quiet world: offers, companions, research, and a personal language. This page respects that and gives it a business operating layer.

No fabricated quotes
No invented credentials
Approval before indexing

WHAT IS ALREADY REAL

Start from her current language.
People and hiring work

Skip to content
FrankX.AI
ALLY SYSTEM - NOINDEX FIRST
Ana AI Business Kit

A practical system for Ana to turn HR, psychology, faith, embodiment, research, and self-knowledge work into clearer offers, better client follow-up, useful content, and travel-friendly income.

The site stays human. The agents stay backstage. The business gets easier to run.

Download the kit
Friend page
Ana's offers

V1 SOURCE

FrankX download first

The GitHub repo should be `frankxai/ana-ai-business-kit` once it exists. Until then, FrankX hosts the ZIP, checksum, and machine-readable manifest.

Status
v0.1.0 starter kit
Public mode
Shareable, noindex
Plugin
Not in v1
ACOS
Optional power layer

OFFER LADDER

Use what she already has.

The business does not need a giant platform first. It needs clean offers, a private operating system, and a way for approved insight to become reusable assets.

Personal Clarity S
